channel.title: Pam on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Pam on Arrans github.io

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: boltgolt/howdy
item.description: 🛡️ Windows Hello™ style facial authentication for Linux

item.title: fairyglade/ly
item.description: A lightweight TUI (ncurses-like) display manager for Linux and BSD (mirror of https://codeberg.org/fairyglade/ly).

item.title: msteinert/pam
item.description: Go wrapper module for the Pluggable Authentication Modules (PAM) API

item.title: ChocolateLoverRaj/rust-fp
item.description: Fingerprint library, dbus interface, CLI, and PAM module for unlocking Linux with fingerprint sensors. Currently for Chromebooks.
